segments.text: Right, thank you very much. 10 minutes we've read.
Minister, inter 대통령, CIAA, proud to hear from you inside the restrictions.
We don't have anything additional to add that is already covered in the min save submission.
I will note though the oversight of not referencing the Victims of Sexual Violence Strengthening Legal
Protection Amendment Bill that is correct and so that bill does increase the penalty for sexual
conduct within under 12-year-old to 20 years. So it actually does do so.
Just ask a question, what are the latest statistics on the jury trouble? You may
not have them with you but we might just ask you to get them. Just what the conviction rate is
from jury trials or any statistics you have on the conviction rates for, I know there's been
considerable work done on that. I'm sure the minister will have it at their fingertips.
Just what the conviction rates are. For jury trials as compared to judge alone or?
Well, anything you do have there along, because I know a lot of that work has been done possibly
by Victoria University, I know just so what the? A lot of that information is already available
on our website, so on the public site you can find data and statistics there and that includes
all those offenses. All right, so it's really available so we'll ask our clerks to buy that
course. Any questions?
No, like the petition I found, the submissions, the written submissions comprehensive. I don't
have any more information.
Na, i datakau pwedebu Maori인 aceitai ang meaningful te lau angaiais pa tondadan gauti!
Apo' vaama, ananahag that concludes the public session, that we'll go back and do committee.
